case_title: HAMMAM YASSEN M ALAFLAH VS. CHRISTOPHER D KENNY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2018 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO FEB-01-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAMMAN YASSEN M ALAFLAH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER KENNY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
